recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.

recommendations.title: Mostly Martha
recommendations.overview: Martha is a single woman who lives for one passion: cooking. The head chef at a chic restaurant, Martha has no time for anything - or anyone - else. But Martha's solitary life is shaken when a fateful accident brings her sister's eight-year-old daugh

recommendations.title: As Needed
recommendations.overview: A 40-year-old world-famous chef with anger management issues is assigned to run a cooking class at a centre for young people with autism.

recommendations.title: The Taste of Things
recommendations.overview: Set in 1889 France, Dodin Bouffant is a chef living with his personal cook and lover Eugénie. They share a long history of gastronomy and love but Eugénie refuses to marry Dodin, so the food lover decides to do something he has never done before: coo

recommendations.title: Delicious
recommendations.overview: France, 1789 - just before the Revolution. When talented chef Manceron is dismissed from his prestigious position by the Duke of Chamfort, he loses the taste for cooking. But when he meets the mysterious Louise, together they decide to create the ver

recommendations.title: Boiling Point
recommendations.overview: A head chef balances multiple personal and professional crises at a popular restaurant in London.

recommendations.title: Natale da chef
recommendations.overview: A bizarre group consisting of a refined chef with unusual recipes, an assistant cook with taste disturbances and an improvised pastry chef takes part in a competition between chefs to win the contract for the G7.

recommendations.title: Soul Kitchen
recommendations.overview: In Hamburg, German-Greek chef Zinos unknowingly disturbs the peace in his locals-only restaurant by hiring a more talented chef.

recommendations.title: Simply Irresistible
recommendations.overview: After her mother's death, mediocre chef Amanda Shelton is having trouble attracting customers to her family's restaurant. While shopping for ingredients, she is given a magical crab by mysterious Gene O'Reilly. Afterward, Amanda's dishes suddenly bec

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Hell
recommendations.overview: Don Champagne seems to have it all, but when his wife, Mona, learns of his affair with a pretty new salesgirl, she will stop at nothing to maintain their storybook life.
